**Sungai Padi Road** ([Thai](/wiki/Thai_language "Thai language"): ถนนสุไหงปาดี, *Thanon Sungai Padi*) or **Khao Kong - Su-ngai Kolok** Or **Narathiwat - Su-ngai Kolok**. **[Highway](/wiki/Thailand_National_Roads "Thailand National Roads") 4056** ([Thai](/wiki/Thai_language "Thai language"): ทางหลวงแผ่นดินหมายเลข 4056) is a major highway in [Narathiwat Province](/wiki/Narathiwat_Province "Narathiwat Province") of [Thailand](/wiki/Thailand "Thailand").
